title: lithocardium sebestana
intro_study: According to "Chemistry & biodiversity", lithocardium sebestana benefits, which is actually a part of the Saussurea genus, include relieving internal heat or fever, harmonizing menstruation, invigorating blood circulation, stopping bleeding, alleviating pain, increasing energy, and curing rheumatic arthritis.
side_effects: Lithocardium sebestana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing stomach upset, diarrhea, and nausea due to its high levels of anthraquinone glycosides. If ingested in large quantities, it can lead to abdominal cramps, vomiting, and even electrolyte imbalances. In rare cases, excessive use may result in kidney damage or allergic reactions, including skin irritation and rashes. Prolonged consumption can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and heart disease.
